titleStmt.title: SII 25.206: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 206. (A.R. No. 206 of 1908.) KŌVILŪR, PATTUKKOTTAI TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south base of the verandah of the first prākāra in the Mantrapurīśvara temple.
This inscription may be assigned to c. 13th century on palaeographical grounds.

It records the grant of 32 kalam for a vēli for 4 mā of lands purchased as kuḍinīṅgāk-kāṇi from the tirunāmattukkāṇi lands of the deity Tiruvuśāttāṉam-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār by Ādittadēvaṉ, a vēḷāṉ of Veḷḷūr in Paiyyūr-kōṭṭam in Perun-Toṇḍaimaṇḍalam. The balance of paddy received as iṟaimigudi was to be given to the Śrīmāhēśvaras of the temple. The grant was entrusted to the Ādichaṇḍēśvara-dēvakaṉmigaḷ of the above temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ Irācentiracoḻa tevaṟku yāṇṭu paṉniraṇṭāva
tu peruntoṉṭai maṇṭalattu paiyyūr koṭṭattu veḷḷur veḷāṉ Ātittatevaṉe
ṉ Uṭaiyār tiruvucāttāṉamuṭaiya nāyaṉār tirunāmattuk kāṇiyil nāṉkuṭi niṅkāk kāṇiyāka koṇ
ṭa Icaiyandrap perumāṉ mayakkal rūpāy Iṉṉilam nālumāvukkum veli Oṉṟukku muppattirukalamāka
vanta nellukku kūṭuvaṉa kūṭṭi Iṟukkavum Iṟaimikutiyāl vanta nellu Iṉṉāyanār koyilile
cimākecurarkku nāḷ Oṉṟukku Oru tirumuṉ Oṭukku kuṭutteṉ Innāyaṉārkoyil Āticaṇṭecura
tevakaṉmikaḷukku veḷuḻāṉ Ātitta tevaneṉ
Digital edition of SII 25.206 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
